data.body: PREPLANNING_CONTEXT: {"version":1,"schema_version":2,"epicId":"c183-ed2a","generatedAt":"2026-04-27T16:44:33Z","generatedBy":"preplanning","epic":{"title":"Adversarial review of inference-sourced decisions + brainstorm completeness attestation","description":"DSO planning workflows silently bypass scrutiny in two ways: (1) inferred decisions affecting high-blast-radius fields ship without adversarial challenge; (2) discovered-too-late questions defer past the point of user attention. This epic delivers the structural channel that makes such bypasses visible at the inference-decision layer.","successCriteria":["SC1: Brainstorm completeness attestation embedded INSIDE Phase 1 Gate; gate cannot return passed without attestation field (exhausted | open); META_QUESTION signal when blocking_for resolves to brainstorm","SC2: dso:red-team-reviewer gains inference-challenge mode; every invocation emits INFERENCE_CHALLENGE or INFERENCE_SKIP; tiered sampling 100%/20%; affects_fields classifier >=95% accuracy","SC3: Challenges surface as ticket comments {decision_id, challenge_type, evidence_against_inference, user_confirmation_required}","SC4: Inference-recall validation via curator agent; recall >=50% all / >=70% held-out; precision >=0.5; CORPUS_INSUFFICIENT if <10","SC5: Sampling rates tunable in dso-config.conf; floor 100 on rate_high_stakes","SC6: >=3 dogfooding brainstorm sessions; >=1 META_QUESTION with non-default user response"]},"researchFindings":[],"stories":[{"id":"893a-d0d3","title":"As a planning infrastructure maintainer, I have foundational contracts for inference decisions, decision_id format, and a curated incident corpus","description":"Deliver four foundational contract files, decision_id format, inference-incident-curator agent, and first-run corpus with anti-hallucination validation","priority":1,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":true,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, decision-id-format.md, inference-envelope.md, inference-incident-schema.md, and META_QUESTION signal contract exist","When complete, inference-incident-curator.md exists with opus tier","When complete, incidents.jsonl has >=20 verified incidents; holdout.txt exists","When complete, 5-incident human attestation comment exists","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] 5-incident human attestation is a blocking external dependency","[Performance] Curator must use ticket list CLI with pagination, not filesystem scans","[Maintainability] decision-id-format.md must specify EXACT session_id sourcing fallback chain"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":[],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC3 (decision_id format), SC4 (curator agent + corpus)"},{"id":"0ecc-65f3","title":"As a planning workflow author, the brainstorm Phase 1 Gate structurally enforces completeness attestation","description":"Embed completeness attestation sub-step inside existing Phase 1 Gate exit condition","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, Phase 1 Gate fails without attestation field (exhausted | open)","When complete, META_QUESTION emitted when blocking_for resolves to brainstorm (not REPLAN_ESCALATE)","When complete, attestation field name documented in contract; decisions_log entry includes workflow_completion_checklist in affects_fields","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] Gate behavior tests needed without full brainstorm session","[Maintainability] Must tag workflow_completion_checklist in affects_fields or S3 classifier drops to 20% bucket"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["893a-d0d3"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC1"},{"id":"18b0-7c5d","title":"As a planning quality reviewer, dso:red-team-reviewer emits typed inference-challenge envelope on every invocation","description":"Add inference-challenge mode to red-team-reviewer with tiered sampling, envelope emission, affects_fields classifier, and config","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, every invocation produces INFERENCE_CHALLENGE or INFERENCE_SKIP (never silence)","When complete, INFERENCE_SKIP includes reason + hash_bucket","When complete, affects_fields classifier >=95% accuracy on high-stakes class","When complete, challenges surface as ticket comments with specified payload","When complete, config keys in dso-config.conf with floor enforcement","When complete, all existing dispatch sites specify mode explicitly","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Testing] affects_fields classifier fixture requires >=100 hand-labeled examples","[Testing] mock-compatible ticket-comment emission interface needed","[Maintainability] CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md must be updated in same change set; floor validator integrated into existing pipeline"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["893a-d0d3"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC2, SC3, SC5"},{"id":"1c7b-74a6","title":"As a planning infrastructure maintainer, inference-recall replay validates challenge system at required recall/precision thresholds","description":"Implement replay measurement against curator corpus with recall/precision gates","priority":2,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, replay recall >=50% all incidents","When complete, replay recall >=70% held-out partition","When complete, precision >=0.5","When complete, CORPUS_INSUFFICIENT emitted when <10 incidents","When complete, unit tests passing"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Corpus quality from S1 determines replay reliability","[Performance] Replay needs bounded runtime for CI","[Testing] Replay must use exact affects_fields classifier from S3, not stub"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["893a-d0d3"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC4"},{"id":"745a-b46d","title":"As a planning workflow author, dogfooding validation confirms META_QUESTION signals surface real course-corrections","description":"Run >=3 brainstorm sessions to observe META_QUESTION signals with non-default user responses","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, >=3 brainstorm sessions run with PRECONDITIONS events accessible","When complete, >=1 META_QUESTION signal with user_answer != null (non-default)"],"considerations":["[Reliability] Requires S2 and S3 merged before dogfooding can begin","Non-code story; no unit tests required"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["0ecc-65f3","18b0-7c5d"],"satisfiesCriterion":"SC6"},{"id":"ec78-d60d","title":"Update project docs to reflect adversarial inference-challenge system, META_QUESTION signal, and new config keys","description":"Update CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md, preplanning SKILL.md Phase 2.5, CLAUDE.md, and completion-verifier guidance","priority":3,"classification":"new","walkingSkeleton":false,"hasWireframe":false,"doneDefinitions":["When complete, CONFIGURATION-REFERENCE.md documents new inference_review config keys","When complete, preplanning SKILL.md Phase 2.5 dispatch specifies mode parameter","When complete, CLAUDE.md describes META_QUESTION as distinct from REPLAN_ESCALATE"],"considerations":["Follow .claude/docs/DOCUMENTATION-GUIDE.md"],"scopeSplitCandidate":false,"splitRole":null,"splitPairId":null,"blockedBy":["893a-d0d3","0ecc-65f3","18b0-7c5d","1c7b-74a6","745a-b46d"],"satisfiesCriterion":"Documentation accuracy"}],"storyDashboard":{"totalStories":6,"uiStories":0,"criticalPath":["893a-d0d3","18b0-7c5d","0ecc-65f3","1c7b-74a6","745a-b46d","ec78-d60d"]}}
